lizzy-chat.title: Lizzy
lizzy-chat.description: Chat with Lizzy, our AI assistant, to get answers to your questions and help you with your projects.

lizzy-transcription.title: Lizzy Transcription
lizzy-transcription.description: Transcribe and edit your client interviews and assign names to speakers - all within a Lizzy secure environment and free of charge.

welcome_message:
Hi, I am Lizzy.
How can I help you today?
chat_prompt: Send a message or question to Lizzy...
chat_secure_message: All chats are confidential. Your data stays within Lizzy's secure Azure EU infrastructure and is never shared externally.
